description: Thresholds for the Webacy depositor-reputation gate

deny_on_sanctioned.description: Deny when the address bucket is 'sanctioned' (any sanctions / OFAC / blocklist hit in the issues array)

deny_on_high_risk.description: Deny when the address bucket is 'high' (DD score above 50)

exploit_exposure_hits_max.description: Maximum number of exploit / hack / drainer / stolen-funds tags allowed before denying. Setting to 1 means a single hit denies.

medium_risk_max_deposit_usd.description: Maximum allowed deposit (in USD) for medium-risk addresses. Above this, deposit is denied.
